hero.subheadline: An editorial-grade bridal & beauty studio where every appointment is finished with the precision of couture — not the speed of a salon chain.

about.title: Not a salon. A studio practice.
about.body: Fast Fashion Beauty Parlour was built on a simple belief: a bride, or anyone getting ready for a defining day, deserves the attention of a craftsperson, not a queue number. Tucked below UCO Bank near Hotel Prakash in Tiwari Tola, our studio has spent over a decade refining bridal artistry, skin therapy, and hair craft for Basti's most detail-oriented clients.
about.pull_quote: We don't rush faces. We finish them.

points.title: Trained Artists
points.detail: Every stylist is certified in bridal HD makeup, keratin systems, and advanced skin therapy.

points.title: Premium Product Lines
points.detail: We work exclusively with dermat-approved and cruelty-free product houses.

points.title: One Bride, One Focus
points.detail: Bridal bookings are single-client per artist — no double-seating on your big day.

why_choose.title: The details a rushed salon skips.

cards.title: Editorial Finish
cards.detail: Makeup and hair styled to photograph, not just to look good in the mirror.

cards.title: On-Time, Every Time
cards.detail: Appointment slots are padded so your service never gets compressed.

cards.title: Hygiene First
cards.detail: Single-use applicators, sterilised tools, and patch-tested products.

cards.title: Trial Before Trust
cards.detail: Every bridal package includes a full trial sitting before the wedding date.

newsletter.title: Seasonal offers, straight to your inbox.
newsletter.body: One email a month — new packages, festive offers, and bridal season slots before they go public.
newsletter.success_message: You're on the list — welcome to the thread.
